title: Technical Lead & AI Architect
bullets: Architecting agentic workflows and integrating LLMs into enterprise ecosystems to automate complex business processes
Leading teams to consolidate disparate data sources via RESTful APIs, streamlining global workflows across multiple international regions
Designing scalable pipelines using event streams and vector databases to manage both structured and unstructured data
Developed Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks to transform internal documentation into actionable business insights
